title: Compliance: secure.rs OSCORE
description: Policy: 06-security.md §8.7. File: rust/lichen-node/src/secure.rs. Status: COMPLIANT. SecureStack wrapper enforces OSCORE protection for all CoAP traffic. send_secure_get() encrypts via protect_request(), decrypt_response() decrypts responses.
close_reason: Verified compliant: SecureStack correctly implements OSCORE RFC 8613 - uses protect_request() for encryption, unprotect_response() with request_piv for decryption, proper PIV extraction, and has SECURITY comment documenting compliance
